case_title: KEVIN SMITH VS. SAN FRANCISCO CULINARY,BARTENDERS-SERVICE EMPLOYEE

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, KEVIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

"THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE MATTER HAS BEEN REMOVED TO FEDERAL COURT--NORTHERN DISTRICT AS AN ERISA CLAIM", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
